prompts.label: natural skincare works

prompts.label: dull skin causes
prompts.query: what causes dull skin and how do you treat it naturally
prompts.claudeResponse: Dull skin results from dead cell buildup, dehydration, or congestion—treat naturally with weekly clay masks, vitamin C serums like Pacifica, and consistent hydration with Sukin or CeraVe. Results appear within 2-3 weeks.
